summary: The diff shows that REQ-1 has been fully implemented. The BrandingBanner component now loads the custom banner image from '/assets/generated/header-banner.dim_1200x300.png' with proper error handling, responsive sizing (h-20 sm:h-28 md:h-36), and a fallback to text when the image fails to load. All acceptance criteria are satisfied.

hallucinated_features.description: Error handling fallback mechanism displaying 'SPEAKR' text when banner image fails to load
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify error handling or fallback behavior. The implementation adds bannerError state and onError handler to display text fallback, which was not requested.
